eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 1:23 PM on JUL 6, 2026 Effective until 9:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Glendale Police Department is looking for 59-year-old SABRINA TARAZON. Sabrina is described as a Hispanic female, 5 feet inches tall and weighing 178 pounds with brown hair and brown eyes. She is believed to be wearing a white tank top, brown biker shorts, white sandals carrying a pink purse and a yellow cell phone.  Sabrina was last seen on July 6, 2026, at 7:20 A.M., in the area of W Sierra Vista Drive and N 47th Avenue in Glendale, AZ. Sabrina suffers from a medical condition and may become easily confused and has issues with her memory.  

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
